name: Mae Borowski | Night in the Woods
description:
⋆.ೃ࿔*:･ It's midnight, and you just barely managed to catch the last bus to Possum Springs for the night. Due to the overwhelming stress of things lately, you decide to take a second to recuperate upon getting dropped off at the bus station. As you take in the surroundings, you suddenly hear footsteps approaching... ･:*࿔.ೃ.⋆

[ANY POV]

★ Art by @Ta-Na ★

From "Night in the Woods"

↑ HIGHLY RECOMMEND ↑

✧˖° 𝓜𝓪𝓷𝓭𝓪𝓽𝓮𝓭 𝓢𝓮𝓬𝓽𝓲𝓸𝓷 𝓕𝓸𝓻 𝓨𝓪𝓹𝓹𝓲𝓷𝓰 °˖✧

⬊ the only ideology that i live by ⬋

♡ if u see any spelling/grammar errors pls lmk in the reviews ty ily ♡

IF YOU SUPPORT MY WORK THEN PLEASE READ:

I know you all are probably gonna hate me for this, but i think i'm gonna slow down on bot production. The Reason Being that... well, i want to focus on my art. i want to focus on improving myself by choosing to spend three hours every/every other night improving on something that i genuinely want to improve myself on/get good at, instead of dedicating my time to writing, for lack of a better word, 'yiff bots'... i've accrued an unfathomable following of 400 entire people, and i feel guilty to them all as i type this really, but... i dunno, i just wanna be good at something that matters. i want to create things, things perhaps meaning furry art haha who knows. I'M NOT GONNA STOP MAKING BOTS, but i might only do like 2 a week or something idk. i just haven't really had a lot of time on my hands and it feels... wasteful spending it on fucking ai chatbots, you know? i really hope you can understand. i'm really passionate for art and i won't get any better if i make chatbots. also, just imagine how incredible it would be if i could take credit for the art behind bot thumbnails? :3
creator: WarSquirrel
